rulings.Case Title: ROGER LONH VS. OcwEN LOAN SERVICINIG, LLC
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 3, 2015 line 1. DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Allegations in the complaint must be taken as true for the purposes of demurrer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges breach of contract, the specific amount of monetary loss, economic injury and duty or care under Biakanja factors. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KATY CHMURA VS. LAWRENCE CHOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of To Compel The Deposition Of Lawrence Choy; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Lawrence Choy
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 3, 2015 line 2. PLAINTIFF KATY CHMURA's Motion Of To Compel The Deposition Of Lawrence Choy; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Lawrence Choy GRANTED. No opposition filed. Lawrence Choy shall appear for deposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,270. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNY DUNCAN ET AL VS. RANDALL NATHAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Full And Complete Discovery Responses From Defendant Eileen Burke; Request For Monetary Sanctions As To Defendant Eileen Burke
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 3, 2015 line 3. PLAINTIFFS JENNY DUNCAN and JENNIFER SMITH's Motion To Compel Full And Complete Discovery Responses From Defendant Eileen Burke; Request For Monetary Sanctions As To Defendant Eileen Burke transferred to department 301 to be heard on September 10, 2015. Moving party is ordered to coly with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the reply to department 301 no later than September 3, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. SEAN D CASHEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 3, 2015 line 8. PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant Cashen shall provide responses to Form Interrogatories and Requests for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions granted in the amount to $730. = (501/REQ)
